title: BEM-705 scheduler blocker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/handoff','scripts']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-20 | 22:41 (UTC+3)'
# 1) Record honest blocker: ChatGPT recurring task not confirmed.
blocker={'code':'CHATGPT_RECURRING_TASK_NOT_CONFIRMED_AFTER_CLAUDE_REQUEST','detail':'BEM-703 Claude mailbox request was sent, but recurring ChatGPT Task monitor confirmation/task-card was not produced in this chat. Repo/Deno cannot mutate ChatGPT account schedules directly; until task confirmation exists, autonomy is partial.'}
state={'schema_version':'scheduler_blocker_and_mailbox_alert_fallback.v1','bem':'BEM-705','status':'blocker_recorded_fallback_installed','chatgpt_task_status':'not_confirmed','claude_request':'BEM-703','fallback':'curator-hourly-report mailbox alert','roadmap_implementation':'paused; not resumed','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem705_scheduler_blocker_and_mailbox_alert_fallback.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# 2) Create mailbox monitor script invoked from existing allowed scheduled workflow only.
script=Path('scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py')
script.write_text(r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
OUT=Path("governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt")
STATE=Path("governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json")
ACTIVE_DIR=Path("governance/agreements/active")
MAILBOX_DIRS=[Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"), Path("governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor")]

def load_json(path):
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
    except Exception:
        return {}

def active_agreements():
    items=[]
    if ACTIVE_DIR.exists():
        for p in sorted(ACTIVE_DIR.glob("*.json")):
            data=load_json(p)
            if data:
                items.append({"path":str(p),"agreement_id":data.get("agreement_id"),"status":data.get("status"),"next_action":data.get("next_action")})
    return items

def scan_mailbox():
    hits=[]
    for d in MAILBOX_DIRS:
        if not d.exists():
            continue
        for p in sorted(d.glob("*")):
            if not p.is_file():
                continue
            txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
            upper=txt.upper()
            if "BEM-703" in txt or "MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY" in upper or "APPROVED" in upper or "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in upper or "BLOCKED" in upper:
                decision="UNKNOWN"
                if "APPROVED" in upper:
                    decision="APPROVED"
                if "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in upper:
                    decision="CHANGE_REQUIRED"
                if "BLOCKED" in upper:
                    decision="BLOCKED"
                hits.append({"path":str(p),"decision":decision,"mtime":p.stat().st_mtime})
    return hits

now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
prev=load_json(STATE)
hits=scan_mailbox()
active=active_agreements()
known=set(prev.get("notified_paths",[]))
new_hits=[h for h in hits if h["path"] not in known]
status="no_new_claude_response"
message=""
if new_hits:
    status="new_claude_response_detected"
    message="BEM-703 | CLAUDE RESPONSE DETECTED\nДата: "+now+"\n\nНайден новый ответ Claude в mailbox. Открой GPT, чтобы он прочитал и зафиксировал согласованный протокол.\n\n"+"\n".join(["- "+h["decision"]+" | "+h["path"] for h in new_hits])+"\n"
else:
    message=""
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"claude_mailbox_monitor_state.v1","status":status,"checked_at":now,"active_agreements":active,"hits":hits,"notified_paths":sorted(set(list(known)+[h["path"] for h in new_hits]))},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
OUT.write_text(message,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":status,"new_hits":len(new_hits)},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
# 3) Patch allowed curator-hourly-report workflow to run monitor before commit, without adding new schedule elsewhere.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
wf_text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
if wf_text and 'scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py' not in wf_text:
    wf_text=wf_text.replace("      - name: Syntax check hourly scripts\n        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py", "      - name: Syntax check hourly scripts\n        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py")
    wf_text=wf_text.replace("      - name: Record delivery status\n        run: python3 scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py\n      - name: Commit hourly report state", "      - name: Record delivery status\n        run: python3 scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py\n      - name: Check Claude mailbox alert\n        run: python3 scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py\n      - name: Send Claude mailbox alert if any\n        env:\n          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}\n          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}\n        run: |\n          if [ -s governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt ] && [ -n \"$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN\" ] && [ -n \"$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID\" ]; then\n            curl -sS -X POST \"https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage\" --data-urlencode \"chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}\" --data-urlencode text@governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt >/dev/null\n          fi\n      - name: Commit hourly report state")
    if 'governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt' not in wf_text:
        pass
    wf.write_text(wf_text)
# 4) Patch commit script to include monitor state/message if exists.
commit=Path('scripts/commit_curator_hourly_state.sh')
ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore') if commit.exists() else ''
if ct and 'governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json' not in ct:
    ct=ct.replace('  "governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json"', '  "governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_response.json"\n  "governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json"\n  "governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt"')
    commit.write_text(ct)
# 5) Update mandatory protocol with correction.
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/MANDATORY_CHATGPT_TASK_MONITOR_RULE.md')
old=protocol.read_text(errors='ignore') if protocol.exists() else ''
addition=sep+'## BEM-705 | Correction and fallback'+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'After each Claude mailbox request, GPT must create/update ChatGPT Task from chat and require task-card confirmation. If confirmation is missing, status is BLOCKER, not PASS. Repo-side fallback is allowed only as alert layer through the already-permitted `curator-hourly-report.yml` schedule; it does not replace ChatGPT Task autonomy.'+sep
if 'BEM-705 | Correction and fallback' not in old:
    protocol.write_text(old+addition)
# Reports/proofs
report=Path('governance/reports/bem705_scheduler_blocker_and_mailbox_alert_fallback.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-705 | Scheduler Blocker And Mailbox Alert Fallback | BLOCKER_RECORDED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Result: BEM-703 recurring ChatGPT Task was not confirmed. This is a blocker for full GPT-side autonomy. Fallback installed in allowed curator-hourly-report schedule to detect Claude mailbox responses and alert operator via Telegram.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem705_scheduler_blocker_and_mailbox_alert_fallback','status':'blocker_recorded_fallback_installed','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem705_scheduler_blocker_and_mailbox_alert_fallback.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-705 BLOCKER_RECORDED: recurring ChatGPT Task confirmation missing after BEM-703; fallback mailbox alert installed in curator-hourly-report.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(script),str(wf),str(commit),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Recorded scheduler confirmation blocker after BEM-703 and installed mailbox response alert fallback inside the only allowed scheduled workflow curator-hourly-report')
"""
No issue comments.
